input: Create a SeedlingIllustration for a spring-start widget — small pots in a tray, just sprouting
Update the GardenIllustration to add a trellis with climbing vines on the right side
Add a new MealsIllustration for the Provisions page — a cozy kitchen scene with a cast iron pot, wooden cutting board, and fresh herbs
Add a WorkshopIllustration — workbench, tools on pegboard, sawdust pile
Add a FireplaceIllustration for the Household winter widget — stone hearth, glowing embers, log stack
failures: COLOR_VARIETY: The illustration is dominated by dark browns and near-blacks with only two small ember circles providing warm color. There are no lighter/warmer values used for the wall background (a muted tan #D4C4B0 is present but no layer5/layer6/layer7-equivalent light accents), and critically the fireplace opening is a large near-black void (#2A2420) that dominates the center. The warm glow from embers is represented by only 2 tiny circles — insufficient warm/light accent coverage for the scene.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The fireplace opening is a large dark rectangle (#2A2420) with logs and embers placed at its bottom edge, but the interior reads as a mostly black void rather than a glowing fire scene. There is no flame, no visible fire glow filling the opening, and the logs appear to float against the dark background without conveying a complete hearth interior. The scene feels incomplete — a fireplace illustration without visible fire or glow fills the central focal area with emptiness.
